Research, Innovation, Development & Entrepreneurship (RIDE) Startup Projects of Students Startup Projects of Students Company Name: Adwicorp Services Private Limited CIN No.: U62099UT2025PTC018563 TAN No.: MRTA25229B PAN No.: ABCCA1180D DPIIT No.: DIPP256696 Date of Registration : 04 February, 2025 Team Name: Aanandam Team members: Divyansh Goel 221030387 Mentor: Prof. Dr. Shruti Jain Brief about the startup: Aanandam is a spiritually driven digital startup that brings the power of ancient Indian mantras and mindfulness practices into modern daily life. Designed for students, professionals, and families, Aanandam aims to make inner peace, focus, and spiritual connection accessible anytime and anywhere. In an increasingly stressful world, the platform leverages the scientifically supported benefits of mantra meditation to help users calm the mind, improve clarity, and build positive habits. The app offers guided mantra chanting with bead-based counting, meditation sessions, a rich devotional library, festival calendars, daily inspirational content, and curated spiritual resources for all age groups. A unique feature allows users to personalize their spiritual journey by saving favourite mantras and practices, making spirituality practical and personal rather than one-size-fits-all. With a growing global user base, Aanandam represents a thoughtful blend of tradition and technology, transforming everyday screen time into meaningful moments of mindfulness and self-growth. Company Name: Erasolis Ventures Private Limited CIN No.: U96090UP2025PTC225313 TAN No.: MRTE04848E PAN No.: AAICE9404D DPIIT No.: N/A Date of Registration : 03 June, 2025 Team Name: ReZen Team members: Saurav Kumar 221030345, Krishna Pratap Singh 231030233 Mentor: Dr. Pradeep Garg Brief about the startup: ReZen is a mental health and well-being startup that aims at ensuring that psychological care is easy, affordable, and stigma-free, especially to young people in Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities. At a time when the prevalence of mental health issues in students has been on the increase but availability of support networks still remains low, ReZen offers the solution in the form of a tech-powered platform that provides ready access to qualified psychologists, high quality wellness tools, and the safe, judgment-free zone through which the students can experience the healing process. We specifically focus our offerings on the specific academic, social and emotional demands of students. ReZen, a highly empathetic, culturally applicable, and affordable approach is also transforming the arena of mental health by resourcing it where it is needed the most. Company Name: Gratify Ventures Private limited CIN No.: U72200HP2025PTC011476 TAN No.: AALCG8213B PAN No.: PTLG22317B DPIIT No.: DIPP201637 Date of Registration : 27 February, 2025 Team Name: Gratify Team members: Shivansh Mahajan 231030073 Krish Monga 231030134 Sidhant Singh 231030179 Brief about the startup: Gratify is a sustainability-first startup that transforms waste disposal into an engaging, tech-driven experience. By combining user input, smart categorization, digital advertising, and rewards, Gratify motivates people to dispose of waste responsibly — while generating value for businesses and the environment. To make waste disposal an interactive, rewarding, and educational activity, driven by user input and powered by smart technology—enabling cleaner cities and smarter communities. Company Name: GLAM AI PRIVATE LIMITED CIN No.: U96020PB2025PTC063549 TAN No.: JLDG09627C PAN No.: AALCG7895F DPIIT No.: DIPP201987 Date of Registration : 19 February, 2025 Team Name: GLAM AI Team members: NITISH SHARMA Brief about the startup: Ai model app for hairstyling and salon which uses the face recoginization method by machine learning and suggest different kinds of hiarstyles , makeup and beardstyles best suitable for the individual according to their face type and preferences along with personalized AI chatbot and virtual assistants for guidances and queries and also let them have virtual try ons including salon integration or sync users can send their different hairstyle , makeup styles to their respective favourite salon owners and book an appointment from the app and let
